name: Crusade of Wrath

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

note: +1 A and +1 S both apply; generated only mentions S. Bonus applies to melee weapons.

name: High Marshal

src.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6, adding 1 to the result for every five models in this model’s unit:on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

note: Damage scales with rolls and unit size; generated omits roll check and scaling logic.

name: Aquilon Optics

src.description: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll, you can re-roll one Wound roll and you can re-roll one Damage roll when resolving its attacks.

note: Grants one re-roll each of hit, wound, damage. Generated says all-failures on damage only.

name: Teleport Homer

src.description: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set this unit up within 3"horizontally of that token and not within 9"horizontally of any enemy models. That token is then removed.

note: Describes refund CP; actual mechanic sets token, grants 0CP Stratagem use. Wrong mechanic.

name: Judgement of the Weak

src.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of this unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

note: Excludes Monsters and Vehicles; test penalty only if Battle-shocked. Generated oversimplifies.

name: Fury of the First

src.description: WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.&x20;EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your unit is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

note: Stratagem, not passive. Wound bonus only if below starting strength. Generated misses both.

name: Inspirational Exemplar

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

note: Grants 5+ critical hits on melee, not -5 to hit. Completely inverted mechanic.

name: Pious Fervour

src.description: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s master-crafted power weapon for each enemy unit within 6"of this model (to a maximum of +3).

note: Bonus applies only to master-crafted power weapon, scaling per enemy within 6". Too narrow.

name: Exploit Their Cowardice

src.description: Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit is selected to Fall Back, after it ends that Fall Back move, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move.

note: Triggers on Fall Back move end, not selection. Grants reactive move if not in engagement range.

name: Attached Unit

src.description: If a CHARACTER from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an INTERCESSOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

note: Broadens Leader attachment eligibility; generated vaguely describes unit status without mechanic clarity.

name: Virtuous Onslaught

src.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible target, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

note: Re-roll applies only to closest eligible target. Generated omits targeting requirement.

name: Legacy of Jerulas

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

note: Applies only to models disembarked this turn, targeting one hit unit. Scope too broad.

name: Litanies of the Devout

src.description: While this unit is leading a unit and contains a Chaplain Grimaldus model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

note: Requires Chaplain Grimaldus model; melee attacks only. Condition narrower than generated.

name: Temple Relics

src.description: In your Command phase, if this unit contains one or more Cenobyte Servitor models, select one Temple Relics ability (see Temple Relics section). Until the start of your next Command phase, this unit’s Chaplain Grimaldus model has that ability.

note: Selects one relic ability; generated describes generic ability swap without naming relics.

name: Vehement Aggression

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit is selected to fight, take a Leadership test for that unit:if passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll; if failed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

note: Re-roll type depends on leadership test result; generated assumes always all failures.

name: Prioritised Eradication

src.description: Each time a model in this model’s unit makes a melee attack that destroys one or more enemy units, roll one D6:on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

note: CP gain is D6 roll 4+, not automatic. Roll requirement missing.

name: Assault Vehicle

src.description: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move, and cannot declare a charge that turn.

note: Disembark after Advance counts as Normal move; cannot charge. Generated misses charge restriction.

name: Orbital Comms Array (Aura)

src.description: While a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit is within 6"of the bearer, each time you target that unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6:on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

note: Only when targeting unit with Stratagem within 6". Trigger condition missing from generated.

src.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 12"of one or more ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

note: Requires allies within 12"; generated implies model acts independently within 12".

name: Executioner
reason: no matching ability on faction datasheets (tried: Repulsor Executioner)

name: Priority Target Acquisition

name: Vengeful Exhortation

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6:on a 4+, do not remove it from play. note: Model fights on death roll 4+ if not yet fought. Generated oversimplifies condition.

name: Martial Honour

src.description: The first time a model in this model’s unit makes a melee attack that destroys one or more enemy units, until the end of the battle, while this model’s unit is not Battle-shocked, add 5 to this model’s Objective Control characteristic.

note: First melee kill triggers permanent +5 OC if not Battle-shocked. Generated structure unclear.

name: Stabilised Disembarkation

src.description: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any of those attacks targeted this TRANSPORT, it can use this ability. If it does, any units embarked within it can disembark. When doing so, models in those units can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6"of this TRANSPORT and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

note: Reactive disembark when transport shot at, within 6", no engagement range. Wrong mechanic.

name: Emergency Combat Embarkation
reason: no matching ability on faction datasheets (tried: Repulsor)
note: Charge phase embark trigger for Sororitas (not Astartes). Wrong faction.

name: Reaping Tally

src.description: This model’s twin heavy onslaught gatling cannon has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability when targeting INFANTRY units.

note: Applies only to twin heavy onslaught gatling vs Infantry. Generated omits weapon/target restrictions.

name: Black Rage

src.description: Each time this model makes a melee attack, you can re‐roll the Hit roll. While this model’s unit is not within 6"of one or more friendly BLOOD ANGELS CHARACTER models, or 12"of one or more friendly CHAPLAIN models, it cannot be selected to Fall Back and its Objective Control characteristic is 0.

name: Driven by Fury

src.description: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if this model was hit by one or more of those attacks, it can make a Driven by Fury move. When doing so, this model can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. A model cannot make a Driven by Fury move while it is Battle‐shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Driven by Fury move per phase.

note: Model reactive move when hit, not generic stat mod. Trigger and mechanic both wrong.

name: Death Vision of Sanguinius

src.description: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, you can roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if the attacking unit contains the enemy WARLORD:on a 2‐3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4 5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

name: An Honourable Death in Combat

name: Redeemer of the Lost

name: Lone Operative

name: Master of the Fleet

name: Strategic Dispersal

name: Vanguard Support

src.description: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but it is not counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. Then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining.

name: Sentry Programming

src.description: You can target this model with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn. This model can only be targeted with that Stratagem once per turn.

name: Templar Vows

src.description:
If your Army Faction is ADEPTUS ASTARTES, at the start of the first battle round, select one of the following Vows to be active for ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army. While a Vow is active for a unit from your army, that unit has the associated ability shown below.
Abhor the Witch, Destroy the Witch: Each time this unit declares a charge, if one or more targets of that charge have the PSYKER keyword, you can re-roll the Charge roll. Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [PRECISION] ability while targeting PSYKER units.
Accept any Challenge, no Matter the Odds: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is less than or equal to the Toughness characteristic of the target, add 1 to the Wound roll.
Suffer Not the Unclean to Live: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back, and each time a model in this unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.
Uphold the Honour of the Emperor: If this unit has the INFANTRY keyword:

■ At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

■ If the mission you are playing features Actions, this unit is eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which it Advanced.

note: Shows one vow subset; official rule requires selecting one of four different vows.

name: Space Marine Chapters

DEATHWATCH

name: Kill Teams
